summary.title: Achievements & Milestones
summary.description: A collection of academic, technical, and professional achievements that demonstrate continuous learning, project development, and commitment to software engineering.

highlights.title: Professional Portfolio Website
highlights.description: Designed and developed a modern, responsive personal portfolio with glassmorphism UI, interactive animations, AI-powered chatbot integration, and modular architecture.

highlights.title: Lost & Found Management System
highlights.description: Built a full-stack Lost & Found platform featuring secure authentication, PostgreSQL database integration, image uploads, and an administrator dashboard.

highlights.title: AI Portfolio Assistant
highlights.description: Developed an AI-powered chatbot using Ollama, modular architecture, local knowledge base, and recruiter-focused conversational capabilities.

academic.title: Bachelor of Technology
academic.description: Currently pursuing Computer Science Engineering with a focus on software development, artificial intelligence, databases, and full stack technologies.

technical.title: Modern Full Stack Development
technical.description: Developed multiple responsive web applications using modern frontend and backend technologies while following clean architecture and modular design principles.

technical.title: Software Architecture
technical.description: Applied modular architecture, reusable components, separation of concerns, and clean coding practices across multiple personal projects.

futureGoals: Master System Design and scalable backend development.
Become a Full Stack Software Engineer.
